name: provider-account-error
_note: Upstream provider / account failures. A generic `error` frame -> error (message + code surfaced, secret-like fields redacted). Bespoke `provider.error` / `account.error` types have no classifier branch -> unsupported. SECURITY: the error payload below embeds a bearer token under an `authorization` key and a long token under a benign key; the error branch surfaces only message/code, and unsupported sanitizes its payload, so neither token may appear in the serialized event. Tokens are OBVIOUSLY FAKE placeholders.
